creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The warning 'Failed to load module "colorreload-gtk-module"' is removed by installing plasma5-kde-gtk-config

Relevant URL for the second error: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/paprefs-pulseaudio-core-dumped-with-glib-gio-error-settings-schema-org-freedesktop-pulseaudio-module-group-is-not-installed.77370/
